page.content: The table lists OrderID 12345 for the Electronics category, utilizing Standard fulfillment, incurring a Cost per Order of £5.00, completed on 2024-01-10, with a Shipping Cost of £2.50, Handling Fee of £1.00, leading to a Total Cost of £8.50 and a Delivery Time of 3 days.

page.content: OrderID 12346 for Clothing, using Express fulfillment, had a Cost per Order of £12.00, shipped on 2024-01-12, with Shipping Cost £5.00, Handling Fee £2.00, resulting in a Total Cost of £19.00 and a Delivery Time of 1 day. OrderID 12347 in the HomeGoods category, under Standard fulfillment, had a Cost per Order of £7.50, pending on 2024-01-15, with Shipping Cost £3.50, Handling Fee £1.50, totaling £12.50 and a Delivery Time of 5 days. The Live Commerce Metrics table shows Total Revenue of £50M, a Conversion Rate of 12.5%, YoY Change of 15.0%, Market Share of 25.0%, and Average Order Value of £24.5. The subsequent rows indicate Total Revenue of £45M with a Conversion Rate of 10.0%, YoY Change of 14.5%, Market Share of 24.5%, and Average Order Value of £24.5; £60M in Total Revenue with a Conversion Rate of 15.0%, YoY Change of 16.0%, Market Share of 26.0%, and Average Order Value of £26.0; £55M with a Conversion Rate of 13.0%, YoY Change of 15.5%, Market Share of 25.5%, and Average Order Value of £25.5; and finally, £70M, with a Conversion Rate of 18.0%, YoY Change of 17.0%, Market Share of 17.0%, and Total Average Order Value.
